application.name: vLLM Warden
application.description: Self-hosted OpenAI-compatible LLM inference with a setup wizard. Deploy any HuggingFace model in minutes.
application.author: PodWarden

env_schema.name: VW_FRONTEND_ORIGIN
env_schema.description: Public UI origin for CSRF/Origin check — e.g. https://vllm.example.com. Must match the URL where the UI is reachable in the browser.

env_schema.name: VW_COOKIE_SECRET
env_schema.description: Session cookie signing secret. Must be at least 32 characters. Generate with `openssl rand -hex 32`.

env_schema.name: VW_CONTAINER_GPU_COUNT
env_schema.description: Number of GPUs visible inside the api container. Defaults to 1; bump if you increased the GPU reservation.

env_schema.name: VW_JWT_SECRET
env_schema.description: JWT signing secret. Leave empty for auto-mint and persist to /data/jwt_secret on first boot.

env_schema.name: NEXT_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL
env_schema.description: Publicly reachable URL of the API service (e.g. https://vllm.example.com). For the common single-ingress setup this is the same hostname as VW_FRONTEND_ORIGIN.
